text: Here's what science actually says about cartilage joints. Cartilage joints are crucial for movement, acting like shock absorbers in your body. Without them, bones would grind against each other, causing pain. Research shows healthy cartilage can adapt under pressure, ensuring longevity. But did you know that cartilage has no blood supply? It relies on joint movement for nourishment. This means staying active is vital for maintaining healthy cartilage. Want to learn more about your body? Hit that follow button!
